---
title: "PBMC CITE-seq Protein-RNA Context Correlation Exploration"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
source("00-paths.R")
out_dir <- file.path(paths$results, "sc", "sc_200_citeseq_protein_rna_contexts")
analysis_file <- file.path(out_dir, "analysis_ready.rds")
summary_file <- file.path(out_dir, "summary_pairs.csv")
ex_file <- file.path(out_dir, "top_exemplars.rds")

stopifnot(file.exists(analysis_file), file.exists(summary_file), file.exists(ex_file))

res <- readRDS(analysis_file)
summary_pairs <- utils::read.csv(summary_file, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
exemplars <- readRDS(ex_file)
```

```{r side-by-side-curve, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
ggplot(res$curve, aes(abs_r_global_threshold, reversal_rate, color = factor(eps))) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(size = 1.2) +
  facet_wrap(~context_definition) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1)) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Precomputed reversal-rate curves by context definition", x = "|r_global| threshold", y = "Reversal rate", color = "eps")
```

```{r helper-filter}
filter_prna_pairs <- function(context_definition = "RNA_defined", min_abs_r = 0.15, min_I2 = 0.4, simpson_only = TRUE) {
  d <- summary_pairs[summary_pairs$context_definition == context_definition, , drop = FALSE]
  keep <- is.finite(d$r_global) & abs(d$r_global) >= min_abs_r & is.finite(d$I2) & d$I2 >= min_I2
  if (simpson_only) keep <- keep & d$flag_simpson
  d[keep, c("feature_x", "feature_y", "r_global", "r_resid", "flag_simpson", "I2", "context_definition")]
}

head(filter_prna_pairs("Joint_RNA_ADT", min_abs_r = 0.2, min_I2 = 0.5), 20)
```

```{r helper-exemplar-bars, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
plot_prna_exemplar_context <- function(context_definition = "RNA_defined", i = 1) {
  ex <- exemplars[[context_definition]]$exemplars[[i]]
  d <- ex$per_context
  ggplot(d, aes(reorder(context, r_c), r_c, fill = n_c)) +
    geom_col() +
    coord_flip() +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(
      title = paste0(context_definition, " exemplar ", i, ": ", ex$pair$feature_x, " vs ", ex$pair$feature_y),
      x = "Context",
      y = "r_c",
      fill = "n_c"
    )
}

plot_prna_exemplar_context("RNA_defined", 1)
```
